Off Calendar May-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VISTA DEL MAR LOGISTICS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No appearances. This matter is OFF CALENDAR at the request of the moving party per email dated May 20, 2019. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com) (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Further Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jacqueline K. Oh, Esq., The Ladva Law firm, Telephone 415-296-8844, appearing for Plaintiff;
No other appearance

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

LAINTIFF MILTON MARTINEZ's Motion To Compel Defendants Further Discovery Responses.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted in full. Plaintiff Milton Martinez's motion to compel Defendant FedEx Ground Package System, Inc. to respond to Plaintiff's first sets of form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and requests for production of documents is granted, and sanctions are awarded against Defendant and its counsel in the amount of $5,010.00.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants Further Discovery Responses

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jacqueline Oh, Esq. 415-296-8844 of the Ladva Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Jason Geller, Esq. 415-490-9000 of Fisher Phillips for Defendant.

Defendant's Counsel do(es) not stipulate to the matter being heard by the Judge Pro Tem.

PLAINTIFF MILTON MARTINEZ's Motion To Compel Defendants Further Discovery Responses

The matter is continued to April 30, 2019 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department. Judge Pro tem to prepare report and recommendation. The Judge Pro Tem did not receive courtesy copies of Defendant's papers. Defendant's Counsel to resubmit courtesy copies of pleading papers to Dept. 302 and must indicate the new date prior to the hearing.
